Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 1 0 0}Woohoo! Thanks, Kirijo-senpai! Right now, I feel like I could die with no regrets![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 1 0 0}C'mon, go after her! Get on your knees, beg for forgiveness, and introduce her to me! Please...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 1 0 0}Ahaha, I tried my hand at sneaking out... but I still got caught.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 2 0 0}Welp, guess we oughta head to our room now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 3 0 0}C'mon, let's hustle... or else Ms. Toriumi might get pissed at us.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 2 0 0}If I was in her shoes, I sure as heck wouldn't be in the mood to go on a trip either.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 155 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 1 0 0}'Sup, {f 4 2}? Wanna check out the outdoor hot spring?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 155 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 3 0 0}I'll grab Sanada-san and Ryoji, so you can head back to the room and get ready.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 155 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 5 0 0}Well, like it or not, you're comin' with me! Just lemme know when you're ready.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 155 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 6 0 0}I'll grab Sanada-san and Ryoji, so you can head back to the room and get ready.[n]{f 1 1}
